determinism.note: enableImmutableInstalls is deliberately NOT pinned in this scaffold's rc — the CI row measures yarn's own default (immutable auto-enabled under CI), the behavior bun only gets from a committed bunfig line and pnpm gets from its CI auto-frozen default

crossTool.errorSample:
➤ YN0000: · Yarn 4.17.0
➤ YN0000: ┌ Resolution step
➤ YN0082: │ is-odd@catalog:: default catalog not found or empty
➤ YN0000: └ Completed
➤ YN0000: · Failed with errors in 0s 17ms

claim: yarn 4.17.0 runs the rollout mechanics natively: byte-identical lockfile resolves (true); --immutable fails closed on drift (exit 1, lock untouched) and CI auto-enables immutable with no config (bare CI install exit 1) — the default bun gets only from a committed bunfig line; named catalogs in .yarnrc.yml route two cohorts to two versions and a repoint edits 0 consumer manifests; workspace: as a catalog value is ACCEPTED (links the local package, like bun; pnpm rejects it); yarn pack bakes workspace:^ -> "^1.2.0" and catalog: -> "3.0.1"; yarn does not read pnpm-workspace.yaml or bun package.json catalogs — author them in .yarnrc.yml.
